description: Contains CPC classification codes assigned at the DOCDB patent family level, with versioning and status information.

columns.name: cpc_gener_auth
columns.description: Authority that generated or assigned the CPC classification.

columns.name: cpc_version
columns.description: Date indicating the version of the CPC scheme used.

columns.name: cpc_position
columns.description: Position indicating whether this is the first or additional CPC code.

columns.name: cpc_action_date
columns.description: Date when the CPC classification was added or modified.

columns.name: cpc_status
columns.description: Status of the CPC code (e.g., active, deleted, transferred).

columns.name: cpc_data_source
columns.description: Source of the CPC classification data.

columns.name: docdb_family_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the DOCDB patent family.

columns.name: cpc_class_symbol
columns.description: CPC classification code assigned to the patent family.

columns.name: cpc_value
columns.description: Value indicating whether this is an inventive (I) or additional (A) classification.
